title: campanula rotundifolia subsp. willkommii
intro: Campanula rotundifolia subsp. willkommii, also known as the Scottish harebell or Alpine bellflower, is a plant species that belongs to the Campanula genus. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Campanula rotundifolia subsp. willkommii include reducing inflammation, relieving anxiety and stress, and supporting the immune system. The herbal preparations of this plant include infusions, tinctures, and dried flowers, which can be used to make teas, capsules, or topical creams.
